title: Project initialization
description: Created implementation plan (6 phases). Created agent.md and devlog.jsonl for session memory. Waiting for user to provide MongoDB URL, Gemini API key, Google Maps key, Cloudinary credentials, JWT secret, and email service config before starting Phase 1.
next_action: Wait for user credentials, then begin Phase 1 - Project Scaffolding

title: Database seeding and local fallback integration
description: Modified backend/.env with local MongoDB and JWT configurations. Seeded the database with initial destinations, hidden gems, experiences, events, and reviews. Integrated a transparent local file upload fallback using a custom Multer storage engine in config/cloudinary.js and updated server.js to serve files statically. Configured a mock response fallback inside services/geminiService.js to allow testing AI features without active Gemini API keys. Verified production build compiles successfully.
next_action: Ready for full manual testing and staging deployment.

title: Migrated color theme to Royal Indigo & Cyan
description: Migrated the entire design system and Tailwind config from the old teal theme to a modern, premium Royal Indigo and Cyan palette. Configured the dark mode background to obsidian black and card background to deep navy slate. Styled the toast messages dynamically using Tailwind classes to support dark mode. Updated charts in AdminDashboard to match the new color system. Verified production build is successful.

title: Replaced Google Maps with Leaflet & OpenStreetMap
description: Installed Leaflet library in frontend and created a reusable LeafletMap React component with default icon path fixes. Integrated LeafletMap in DestinationDetail.jsx, replacing the previous Google Maps iframe. Checked that the production build completes successfully.

title: Implemented automatic Cloudinary URI parsing
description: Updated backend/config/cloudinary.js to parse the full cloudinary:// connection URL from environment variables, enabling successful authentication and uploads to Cloudinary without fallback. Tested and verified upload function with credentials.

title: Polished responsiveness for mobile and tablet
description: Resolved mobile and tablet display issues by implementing toggleable filters in Destinations.jsx. Integrated scrollable horizontal sub-navbars in DashboardLayout.jsx and AdminLayout.jsx, allowing seamless mobile access to all AI features and administrative controls. Verified production build is successful.
